args.query:
WITH swift_repos AS (
  SELECT repo_name
  FROM metadata_database.languages
  WHERE lower(language_description) LIKE '%swift%'
)
SELECT c.id,
       any_value(c.sample_repo_name) AS sample_repo_name,
       any_value(c.sample_path) AS sample_path,
       COUNT(*) AS copies
FROM contents c
JOIN swift_repos s ON s.repo_name = c.sample_repo_name
WHERE lower(c.sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (c.repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(c.repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
GROUP BY c.id
ORDER BY copies DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT id,
       any_value(sample_repo_name) AS repo_name,
       any_value(sample_path) AS sample_path,
       MAX(CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_appears,
       MAX(CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_seen,
       MAX(CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'duplicated ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_duplicated
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND lower(repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%'
GROUP BY id
ORDER BY COALESCE(copies_appears, copies_seen, copies_duplicated) DESC, id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH swift AS (
  SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
  FROM contents
  WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
    AND lower(repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%'
)
SELECT id,
       any_value(sample_repo_name) AS repo_name,
       any_value(sample_path) AS sample_path,
       MAX(try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_appears,
       MAX(try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_seen,
       MAX(try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'duplicated ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_duplicated,
       MAX(COALESCE(
            try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER),
            try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER),
            try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'duplicated ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)
       )) AS copies
FROM swift
GROUP BY id
ORDER BY copies DESC, id
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH swift AS (
  SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
  FROM contents
  WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
    AND lower(repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%'
)
SELECT id,
       any_value(sample_repo_name) AS repo_name,
       any_value(sample_path) AS sample_path,
       MAX(try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_appears,
       MAX(try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_seen,
       MAX(try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'duplicated ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)) AS copies_duplicated,
       MAX(COALESCE(
            try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER),
            try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER),
            try_cast(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, 'duplicated ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER)
       )) AS copies
FROM swift
GROUP BY id
ORDER BY copies DESC, id
LIMIT 1;
